mapper.select: SELECT A.SHPMNO ,A.SHPMID ,B.SHPMDETLID ,B.ITEMCD ,C.ALQTY FROM TT_SHPM_T A , TT_SHPM_DETL_T B , ( SELECT CTKEY, ORDTKEY, ICKEY, SUM(ALQTY)+SUM(PIQTY)+SUM(CFQTY) AS ALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT WHERE CTKEY=#{ctkey} AND OBHDKEY=#{obhdkey} GROUP BY CTKEY, ORDTKEY, ICKEY ) C WHERE A.SHPMID=B.SHPMID AND A.SHPMNO=B.SHPMNO AND A.SHPMNO=#{orhdkey} AND A.DIVCD=#{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY=#{owkey} AND B.ATTRIBUTE2=C.ORDTKEY AND B.ITEMCD=C.ICKEY
